label: SA pipeline + sphere instancing + audio binding (canonical attractor_chamber lift)
context: Third visualizer for Eyes Cut Deeper remix (cusp 4→5). Lifts SA + sphere instance pattern from attractor_chamber/move_001.json (which built inside a baseCOMP) but builds directly at /project1 per attractor_chamber v002 simplification. POPX SA module copied from POPX_Examples_1_3_0/examples/strange-attractors.tox.

operations.notes: Custom Audio page with Energy/Audiofloor/Audioceil/Audioexp params. Energy=0 default (manual slider, audio binding deferred until base_audio is dropped in).
Loaded example container, copied pointgen1 and sa1 to /project1, deleted the example container. Cleared orphan parent.Example/parent.POPX expressions on sa1.Startpulse and sa1/feedback1.startpulse.
Aizawa attractor — torus with internal structure, reads as iris-like radial pattern from front-on camera angle
Single audio binding per attractor_chamber pattern. max(0.0, energy) clamp required — audio analysis returns ~e-22 negative noise at silence, breaking non-integer pow().
Default tox numpoints was 100k — too many. attractor_chamber proven at 3000.

operations.before: default torus child auto-created by geometryCOMP
operations.notes: Per gotcha tracker: geometryCOMP auto-creates torus1 (render=True) — kills new builds with white blob unless destroyed

Per gotcha tracker: oplength reads 1 from POPX null even when numPoints=3000 — must use manual mode + explicit count. Master par.instancing must be True (separate from instance0 sub-counter). Attribute syntax is 'P(N)' parens for component access.
tx/ty=0, tz=5 (back from origin). bg black. lookat will be added in move_002 (centroid tracker).
TEMPORARY single light at (2,2,2) for move_001 verification. To be replaced by 4 palette-cycling lights in move_002.
720x720 square. par.geometry='geo_attractor' (glob pattern, NOT full path — full path silently fails per gotcha tracker).

verified: renderTOP shows 3000 instanced spheres in 3D distribution
ctrl_master.par.Energy 0→1 drives sa1.Timescale 0.1→2.1 via the audio expression
0 hard errors; 2 warnings cosmetic (POPX-internal sync warnings)
next_move: move_002 — replace light_test with 4 palette-cycling lights + add centroid tracker for camera lookat (Aizawa's mass-center wanders, fixed lookat causes drift)
